name: Lo Mein Shrimp-Chicken-Pork-Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti as directed on package, until al dente. Drain and rinse in cold water, adding a few drops of oil to prevent sticking. Set aside.
2. Slice steak very thin, across the grain, into 2-inch pieces. Mix together with ginger, scallion, cornstarch, sugar, light soy sauce. Set aside to marinate.
3. Heat wok to smoking point, add 2 tablespoons peanut oil. Stir fry meat mixture for two minutes, do not overcook. Reserve.
4. Add 2 tablespoons oil, heat, and stir fry carrots and cabbage for two minutes. Add spaghetti and stir well until combined. Cook a few more minutes.
5. Add the meat mixture, 1 tablespoon soy sauce, and salt. Stir for one minute to heat through and serve. Stir-fry cooking allows for many substitutions and additions of vegetables without going wrong.
